# Policy Tracker V3 — Design Specification

**Reference app:** https://github.com/Phaderon/policy-management-app  
**Generated by:** V0 from design brief. User confirmed: "This looks beautiful."  
**Status:** Approved visual direction. Use this as the definitive target for YAML rebuild.

---

## Colour Palette (translate to RGBA for PowerApps)

| Token | oklch | RGBA approx | Use |
|-------|-------|-------------|-----|
| Background | oklch(0.97 0.004 250) | RGBA(243, 244, 248, 1) | Screen fill |
| Card | white | RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1) | Card/container fill |
| Panel | oklch(0.99 0.003 250) | RGBA(251, 251, 253, 1) | Slightly raised surface |
| Foreground | oklch(0.24 0.02 258) | RGBA(28, 32, 48, 1) | Primary text |
| Muted text | oklch(0.5 0.016 256) | RGBA(112, 116, 134, 1) | Secondary text, labels |
| Border | oklch(0.24 0.02 258 / 12%) | RGBA(28, 32, 48, 0.12) | Card borders |
| Primary (forest green) | oklch(0.5 0.11 158) | RGBA(46, 125, 89, 1) | Accent, active states, primary buttons |
| Primary bg tint | | RGBA(46, 125, 89, 0.12) | "Owned by me" active button bg |

### Document Type Colours

| Type | Background RGBA | Text RGBA | Use |
|------|----------------|-----------|-----|
| CFSO | RGBA(56, 96, 178, 1) | RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1) | Steel blue |
| CFI | RGBA(46, 125, 89, 1) | RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1) | Forest green |
| Manual | RGBA(191, 132, 38, 1) | RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1) | Amber/gold |
| JSP | RGBA(180, 62, 40, 1) | RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1) | Terracotta red |

### Status Colours

| Status | RGBA | Use |
|--------|------|-----|
| On Track | RGBA(46, 140, 100, 1) | Green dot |
| At Risk | RGBA(191, 150, 50, 1) | Amber dot |
| Blocked | RGBA(200, 72, 50, 1) | Red dot (pulse animation if possible) |
| Published | RGBA(100, 110, 140, 1) | Muted grey dot |

---

## Typography

- **Primary font:** Open Sans (already in app)
- **Mono font:** Use `Font.'Courier New'` or set `Font: =Font.'Courier New'` for reference numbers, type labels, section headers, stat counter labels
- **Type label on card:** Size 28–30, Bold, White — this is the DOMINANT element
- **Card title:** Size 14, Semibold
- **Section date headers:** Size 11, Bold, Uppercase, Mono, Muted colour, letter-spaced
- **Field labels in detail view:** Size 10, Bold, Uppercase, Mono, Muted colour — like "PLANNED DATE", "OWNER", "STATUS"

---

## Screen 1: Main (Dashboard)

### Stat Counter Bar
- 4 cells in a single horizontal row, separated by 1px borders, unified outer border, radius 8
- Each cell: `CURRENT CYCLE` label (mono 11px uppercase), large number (mono 28px bold), hint text beneath ("due this Thu")
- Accent colours: Current = primary green, Future = foreground, Issues = amber, Archive = muted
- Height: ~80px total bar

### Controls Row (below stats)
- **Search box:** Left-aligned, magnifier icon inside, placeholder "Search by title, reference, owner…", border 1px, radius 6, height 40
- **Type filter:** Segmented pill group — buttons for All / CFSO / CFI / Manual / JSP. Active = solid accent bg + white text. Inactive = transparent + muted text. Mono font, uppercase, bold. NOT a dropdown.
- **Owned by me:** Bordered button with slider icon + "Owned by me" text. Active state = green border + green bg tint + green text. Inactive = grey border + muted text.

### Date Section Headers
- Mono font, uppercase, bold, size 11, muted colour
- Format: "3 JUL 2026" style
- Count badge alongside: rounded pill, muted bg, "4 releases"
- Horizontal rule extending to right edge

### Gallery Cards (THE KEY REDESIGN)
- **TemplateSize: 130** (taller than before)
- **Card anatomy — horizontal split:**

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  TYPE  │  Reference · "Mine" badge · Priority flag       │
│ PANEL  │  Title (bold, 14px)                             │
│ 100px  │                                                 │
│ solid  │  ──────────────────────────────────────────     │
│ colour │  [Avatar] Rank Name · Unit    📅 3 Jul  ● On Track│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- **Left type panel:** Rectangle, Width=100, full card height, Fill=type colour from colChoiceColors. Label centred in panel, Text=ThisItem.'Document Type'.Value (e.g. "CFSO"), Size=26, Bold, White, Courier New font. Below it: small classification label (Size=9, White 70% opacity).
- **Right content area:** X=108, padding 12px top
  - Row 1: Reference label (mono, 10px, muted) + "Mine" badge (visible if Owner.Email = varMyEmail) + priority flag (⚑ amber if High, red if Immediate)
  - Row 2: Title label (14px, Semibold, foreground, wraps to 2 lines max)
  - Divider: thin horizontal line at Y=~95
  - Row 3 (bottom): Owner initials circle (28px, type-colour bg) + Owner name + unit (11px, muted) | Date with calendar emoji | Status dot + label
- **Card border:** 1px RGBA(28,32,48,0.12), Radius 8, DropShadow.Light
- **Hover state:** DropShadow.Regular (slightly stronger shadow) — use btnCardOverlay for click capture
- **Empty state:** When gallery has 0 items — show a label: "No releases match your filters." centred, muted, inside a dashed-border container

### Layout
- Cards fill full gallery width (no two-column in PowerApps — single column)
- Gallery scrolls vertically; date section headers are part of the template using conditional visibility

---

## Screen 2: Overview

### Layout
- **Horizontal gallery** (not vertical scroll), 4 columns for next 4 Thursdays
- Each column card: white bg, border, radius 8, shadow
- **Column header:** Type-coloured top band (or primary green for current week). Date in mono bold. Count badge (amber circle, white number).
- Current week column: primary green border highlight (BorderColor = primary, BorderThickness = 2)

### Compact Item Cards (inside each column)
- Height ~80px, white bg, border, radius 6
- Left: 6px coloured type bar (Rectangle, full height)
- Type badge (small pill, 10px mono bold)
- Title (13px semibold, 2 line max)
- Bottom row: owner initials + reference + status dot

---

## Screen 3: Historic (Archive)

### Layout
- Table-style, not cards
- **Column headers:** TITLE / TYPE / OWNER / DATE / STATUS — sortable (show sort arrow on active column)
- **Rows:** alternating very subtle bg tint every other row for scannability
- **Type in table:** Small type pill (coloured bg, white text, mono bold) — compact, not full-panel
- **Status:** dot + text label
- Owner: initials circle + name
- Search bar at top, count label

---

## Screen 4: ViewItem (Item Detail)

### Header Band
- Full width, height ~100px, Fill = type colour (from colChoiceColors lookup on Document Type)
- Left section (X=20): Large type label (mono 32px bold white), vertical separator, Reference (mono 14px white), Type full name beneath (12px white 80% opacity)
- Title below that: 18px bold white, wrapping

### Two-Panel Layout
- **Left panel (Width ~680):** All form fields
  - Field labels: mono 10px uppercase bold muted — "PLANNED PUBLISH DATE", "DOCUMENT TYPE", "STATUS", "OWNER" etc.
  - Inputs: height 40, border 1px, radius 6, bg panel colour
  - Approval radio buttons: keep as-is (Classic/Radio), but label styled as field
  - Action buttons at bottom: Save (primary green), Delete (red), Duplicate
- **Right panel (Width ~350):** Attachments/links
  - Panel header: "Attachments & Links" in mono uppercase
  - Each link row: icon (document type icon) + link text + external arrow icon, clickable row that opens in new tab
  - Add link button at bottom
  - Delete attachment button per row (trash icon, visible on hover)

### Warning Banner
- Amber bg strip below header when item is within 10 days of publish date
- "⚠ Publishing in X days — final checks required"

---

## Key PowerApps Implementation Notes

### colChoiceColors collection (set in App.OnStart)
```
ClearCollect(colChoiceColors,
  {Type: "CFSO",   Fill: RGBA(56, 96, 178, 1),  TextColor: RGBA(255,255,255,1)},
  {Type: "CFI",    Fill: RGBA(46, 125, 89, 1),   TextColor: RGBA(255,255,255,1)},
  {Type: "Manual", Fill: RGBA(191, 132, 38, 1),  TextColor: RGBA(255,255,255,1)},
  {Type: "JSP",    Fill: RGBA(180, 62, 40, 1),   TextColor: RGBA(255,255,255,1)}
)
```

Reference in gallery: `LookUp(colChoiceColors, Type = ThisItem.'Document Type'.Value).Fill`

### Card left panel formula
```
Fill: =LookUp(colChoiceColors, Type = ThisItem.'Document Type'.Value, Fill)
```

### Empty state visibility
```
Visible: =CountRows(galMain.AllItems) = 0
```

### "Owned by me" active state
```
Fill: =If(varShowMyEntries, RGBA(46,125,89,0.15), RGBA(0,0,0,0))
BorderColor: =If(varShowMyEntries, RGBA(46,125,89,1), RGBA(180,184,200,1))
Color: =If(varShowMyEntries, RGBA(46,125,89,1), RGBA(112,116,134,1))
```

### Type filter segmented control
- 5 Classic/Button controls side by side (All, CFSO, CFI, Manual, JSP)
- Active: Fill = RGBA(46,125,89,1), Color = White
- Inactive: Fill = Transparent, Color = muted
- OnSelect: `=Set(varTypeFilter, "CFSO")` etc.
- Gallery filter: `(varTypeFilter = "All" || ThisItem.'Document Type'.Value = varTypeFilter)`

### Status dot colour
```
Fill: =Switch(ThisItem.Status.Value,
  "On Track", RGBA(46,140,100,1),
  "At Risk",  RGBA(191,150,50,1),
  "Blocked",  RGBA(200,72,50,1),
  RGBA(100,110,140,1))
```

### Radius rule
- `Rectangle@2.3.0` has NO radius properties — use `Classic/Button@2.2.0` with DisplayMode.View for any rounded rectangle
- `GroupContainer@1.5.0` supports RadiusTopLeft/Right/BottomLeft/Right

### PA1001 rule
- ANY formula value containing `: ` (colon-space) MUST use `|-` block scalar
- Includes: `UpdateContext({key: value})`, `HtmlText` with CSS like `border: 1px`, any inline record literal
- Always validate with PyYAML before wrapping to HTML (see project memory)

---

## What to Build — Session Checklist

- [ ] App.OnStart: colChoiceColors, varMyEmail, varTypeFilter="All", varShowMyEntries=false
- [ ] StartScreen: unchanged (logo + navigate to Main)
- [ ] Main: stat bar + controls row + grouped gallery with new card design + empty state
- [ ] Overview: horizontal 4-column Thursday layout
- [ ] Historic: sortable table layout
- [ ] ViewItem: coloured header band + two-panel layout + attachments right panel
- [ ] Validate all YAML with PyYAML before wrapping
- [ ] Bump version on every change
- [ ] Push to GitHub Pages after each screen
